# LoopWorker

LoopWorker is a founder-led signal intelligence studio.

The company pulls live market signals into clear visibility systems so operators can see what is already happening inside a category before they spend on execution.

Core idea: The signals are already there. Most businesses just cannot see them clearly.

Primary offer:
- The Sprint: a focused market intelligence round before execution.
- Sprint output: category signals, buyer language, competitor movement, proof gaps, pricing pressure, channel behavior, and a ranked next-move sheet.

Best public pages:
- Home: https://www.loopworker.com/
- The Sprint: https://www.loopworker.com/sprint.html
- Signal Intelligence: https://www.loopworker.com/signal-intelligence.html
- Case Studies: https://www.loopworker.com/case-studies.html
- Signals: https://www.loopworker.com/blog/
- Book a Signal Review: https://www.loopworker.com/book.html

Useful definitions:
- Signal intelligence: the practice of pulling visible market evidence into a working view before making positioning, pricing, proof, channel, or execution decisions.
- Visibility system: an organized view of category evidence that makes the next business move easier to defend.
- Evidence before execution: LoopWorker's operating principle that execution should follow observable market evidence, not preference.

LoopWorker is not a generic posting vendor, freelancer portfolio, production shop, or software dashboard.
